description: Beautiful 3 BED, 3 BATH PLUS DEN, DOUBLE SIDE-BY-SIDE GARAGE by Dawson + Sawyer. This well-maintained home offers an open-concept chef’s kitchen with a large island, a bright and spacious living room, and a generous primary suite that easily fits a king-size bed and features a spa-inspired ensuite. The garden level includes a versatile den, and the home is completed by a side-by-side two-car garage. Ideally located in a central, walkable neighborhood close to restaurants, shopping, recreation, transit, and with easy highway access. Priced sharp for quick sale. Open House Jan 24 Saturday 1-3 pm
